data.content: Implementation complete on branch worktree-inline-title-9345. Removed title column from getBeatColumns. Created InlineTitleContent component in beat-column-helpers.tsx preserving hierarchy rendering (chevrons, indentation, child-count badges), wave-slug prefix, meta badges, labels, title click. BeatTableRow now renders 3-row structure: metadata cells, inline title band (truncated, spans all cols), optional summary. TitleRenderOpts threaded from useBeatTableState. Summary colSpan uses totalCols. All gates pass: lint 0 errors, typecheck clean, 2250/2250 tests, build OK.
